chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5423 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ For order as to non-prosecution of petition. ----------- Dated; 5th December 2023 None present. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner and his counsel are called absent, no intimation is received. Record reflects that instant petition was filed on 07.11.2023, however, subject to maintainability of instant petition notices have been issued to the respondents, whereafter, the petitioner has neither paid costs nor supplied copy, which leads to conclude that the petitioner has not interested in pursuing instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
